package rulecoverage

func PositiveFmtSprintfQuoteToString() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_sprintf_quote_to_string"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Sprintf(\"%q\", s)` instead of `strconv.Quote(s)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
